items.title: Quantum mechanics once baffled scientists. Now it's changing the world
items.summary: Quantum mechanics has journeyed from a strange and controversial idea to the foundation of some of humanity’s most advanced technologies. Now researchers are pushing its boundaries even further, with potential breakthroughs in energy, medicine, computing, and our understanding of the universe.

items.title: Četiri "zdrave" navike koje usporavaju metabolizam nakon 40. godine
items.summary: BROJNE stvari mogu utjecati na metabolizam, no nakon 40. godine određene navike mogu donijeti više štete nego koristi.

items.title: Scientists discover the deep sleep circuit that builds muscle, burns fat, and boosts the brain
items.summary: Researchers have identified the brain circuitry that links deep sleep with the release of growth hormone, revealing how the two regulate each other. items.title: The secret to healthy aging may be hidden in your blood
items.summary: Some people live past 100 with remarkable health, and researchers may have uncovered one reason why. items.title: A hidden weakness in deadly cancers could lead to powerful new treatments
items.summary: A UCLA study has identified a hidden Achilles' heel in aggressive small cell cancers that have resisted new treatments for decades.
